intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How to Design Better YouTube Thumbnails. Effective thumbnails are readable at small sizes, emotionally clear, and consistent with the video. Avoid misleading imagery that spikes CTR then tanks retention.
mainSummary: Effective thumbnails are readable at small sizes, emotionally clear, and consistent with the video. Avoid misleading imagery that spikes CTR then tanks retention.
